card_text:
GPT-5.5 Pro is a comparative catalog entry for OpenAI.

Weekly tokens: 295M.
Context Window: 1,050,000 tokens.
Released: 2026-04-24.
Pricing: $30 per 1M input tokens and $180 per 1M output tokens.
Capabilities: text, reasoning, coding, agentic, long context.

Comparative metadata: weekly tokens 14.8B; context window 1,050,000 tokens; released 2026-04-24; pricing $5/M input and $30/M output.
